actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: St Mirren have signed Tottenham's Sonupe on a season-long loan deal.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Holroyd, 30, and Jennings, 29, have signed for Notts County.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Gold Cup winner beat rivals Seventh Sky and Southfield Theatre on Sunday to claim his first win since taking steeplechasing's blue riband prize in March.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Japanese firm Hitachi employs more than 800 people across Northern Ireland.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Two people died when the plane came down in a North Yorkshire field.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: More than 1,200 seats will be available across 22 local authorities in Wales on Thursday 4 May.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Edison Mulaj, 19, of New Road, Gravesend, admitted carrying out an attack off Parrock Street, Gravesend in the early hours of 22 March.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: James Brendan O'Connor, 70, was hit by a car while walking along the Culmore Road just before 19:00 GMT on Sunday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Manchester-based estate agents David Currie and Co said the suggestion to rename Plas Glynllifon near Caernarfon as "Newborough Hall" was made by its marketing department.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The leader of the Irish nationalist party Sinn Fein, Gerry Adams, called on the Irish and British governments to implement those elements of the Stormont House Agreement that deal with the past and legacy issues.
